---
title: "05 — Scenario Simulation & What‑If Analysis"
author: "Waldo Ketonou"
output: html_document
---
# Introduction
this notebook runs scenario simulations using the final Random Forest model from the Walmart Sales Forcasting Project.
Model used:
RF Large (1M rows) — final selected Random Forest model
Goals:
Simulate how key drivers (fuel price, CPI, temperature, holiday flag) impact weekly sales
Quantify average and percentage change vs baseline predictions
Produce a summary table and visuals for the case study and dashboard
All data preparation and model training must be completed before running this notebook.
# Load Libraries
```{r)
